CVE-2023-46565.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in osrg gobgp commit 419c50dfac578d ...
CVE-2023-46565.summary: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in osrg gobgp commit 419c50dfac578daa4d11256904d0dc182f1a9b22 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the handlingError function in pkg/server/fsm.go.

CVE-2025-43970.title: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. pkg/packet/mrt/mr ...
CVE-2025-43970.summary: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. pkg/packet/mrt/mrt.go does not properly check the input length, e.g., by ensuring that there are 12 bytes or 36 bytes (depending on the address family).

CVE-2025-43971.title: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. pkg/packet/bgp/bg ...
CVE-2025-43971.summary: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. pkg/packet/bgp/bgp.go allows attackers to cause a panic via a zero value for softwareVersionLen.

CVE-2025-43972.title: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. An attacker can c ...
CVE-2025-43972.summary: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. An attacker can cause a crash in the pkg/packet/bgp/bgp.go flowspec parser by sending fewer than 20 bytes in a certain context.

CVE-2025-43973.title: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. pkg/packet/rtr/rt ...
CVE-2025-43973.summary: An issue was discovered in GoBGP before 3.35.0. pkg/packet/rtr/rtr.go does not verify that the input length corresponds to a situation in which all bytes are available for an RTR message.
